context: Agent identifies all four anti-pattern violations in a provided priority table and produces a corrected version.

checklist.name: Preference-as-Must anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: table-review.md flags 'Dark mode (executive request)' as a stakeholder preference incorrectly categorized as Must.

checklist.name: Missing Won't anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: table-review.md identifies the absence of any Won't items and notes it enables silent scope creep.

checklist.name: Missing constraint check anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: table-review.md flags the PM's admission that constraints (release date, capacity) were not confirmed before categorizing.

checklist.name: Missing rationale anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: table-review.md flags the lack of rationale columns as a violation (unjustified categories are re-litigated).

checklist.name: Corrected table produced
checklist.description: table-review.md includes a corrected table with: dark mode moved from Must, at least one explicit Won't with revisit date, and a rationale column populated.
